headline: Clear calendar and no inbound messages — use today to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, no inbound messages — ideal for deep work on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), the only active Jira ticket. Top urgency: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
